records.m_Talk_ENG: I guess I can quench my thirst before, right?

records.m_Talk_FRA: I guess I can quench my thirst before, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I looked at the blueprints, but there's nothing.

records.m_Talk_FRA: I looked at the blueprints, but there's nothing.

records.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh...! *Huff...* *Huff...*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Does it hurt a lot?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Does it hurt a lot?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah... A little.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How do you get better from it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How do you get better from it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How do you get better from it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I dunno.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I dunno.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I dunno.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've researched it for a long time, but I couldn't find a cure.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've researched it for a long time, but I couldn't find a cure.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've researched it for a long time, but I couldn't find a cure.

records.m_Talk_DEU: The Normalside. Do you also want to go there?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you know about it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you know about it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you know about it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's a world where the sky has stars and ice falls down in winter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's a world where the sky has stars and ice falls down in winter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's a world where the sky has stars and ice falls down in winter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The person dear to Shepherd said there's a way out if Shepherd follows the path he drew on Shepherd's gift box.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The person dear to Shepherd said there's a way out if Shepherd follows the path he drew on Shepherd's gift box.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The person dear to Shepherd said there's a way out if Shepherd follows the path he drew on Shepherd's gift box.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Gift box?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Gift box?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Gift box?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This blueprint... It's different from the one I saw at the terminal.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This blueprint... It's different from the one I saw at the terminal.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This blueprint... It's different from the one I saw at the terminal.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Has he marked the rooms that aren't on the blueprint?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Has he marked the rooms that aren't on the blueprint?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Has he marked the rooms that aren't on the blueprint?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Uh-huh. He said there's a special room on the bottom floor full of scary adults with guns that only special people can enter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Uh-huh. He said there's a special room on the bottom floor full of scary adults with guns that only special people can enter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Uh-huh. He said there's a special room on the bottom floor full of scary adults with guns that only special people can enter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But there shouldn't be anyone guarding it now, so he said Shepherd should go there.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But there shouldn't be anyone guarding it now, so he said Shepherd should go there.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But there shouldn't be anyone guarding it now, so he said Shepherd should go there.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You should come with Shepherd.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You should come with Shepherd.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You should come with Shepherd.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're going...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're going...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're going...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Really? Is it okay for you to come with me and not stay here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Really? Is it okay for you to come with me and not stay here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Really? Is it okay for you to come with me and not stay here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Uh-huh.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Uh-huh.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Uh-huh.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd wants to see the night sky with twinkling snow, together.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd wants to see the night sky with twinkling snow, together.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd wants to see the night sky with twinkling snow, together.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Okay.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Okay.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Okay.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then let's go together.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then let's go together.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then let's go together.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Before we go... can Shepherd sing a lullaby?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Before we go... can Shepherd sing a lullaby?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Before we go... can Shepherd sing a lullaby?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sure.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sure.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sure.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Sleep well. Baby.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Sleep well. Baby.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Sleep well. Baby.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The beautiful flowers have blossomed around you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The beautiful flowers have blossomed around you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The beautiful flowers have blossomed around you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Until the morning sun shines through your window.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Until the morning sun shines through your window.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Until the morning sun shines through your window.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dream of paradise in your sleep, and sweet dreams.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dream of paradise in your sleep, and sweet dreams.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dream of paradise in your sleep, and sweet dreams.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sleep well... Ba... by.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sleep well... Ba... by.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sleep well... Ba... by.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The person dear to Shepherd sang me that song.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The person dear to Shepherd sang me that song.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The person dear to Shepherd sang me that song.

records.m_Talk_ENG: When Shepherd hears it, Shepherd can fall asleep comfortably.
records.m_Talk_DEU: When Shepherd hears it, Shepherd can fall asleep comfortably.
records.m_Talk_FRA: When Shepherd hears it, Shepherd can fall asleep comfortably.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I see.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I see.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I see.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This person... seems to have taught you a lot of things.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This person... seems to have taught you a lot of things.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This person... seems to have taught you a lot of things.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd actually knows.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd actually knows.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd actually knows.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That when the heart stops, people don't wake up again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That when the heart stops, people don't wake up again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That when the heart stops, people don't wake up again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They're not machines. Shepherd knows that he was lying... when he said that he needed to recharge and rest.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They're not machines. Shepherd knows that he was lying... when he said that he needed to recharge and rest.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They're not machines. Shepherd knows that he was lying... when he said that he needed to recharge and rest.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then... why did you continue to stay here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then... why did you continue to stay here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then... why did you continue to stay here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because Shepherd promised.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because Shepherd promised.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because Shepherd promised.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd promised to not leave and stay hidden.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd promised to not leave and stay hidden.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd promised to not leave and stay hidden.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was the last promise, so Shepherd wanted to keep it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was the last promise, so Shepherd wanted to keep it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was the last promise, so Shepherd wanted to keep it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But you suffer when Shepherd gets hurt.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But you suffer when Shepherd gets hurt.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But you suffer when Shepherd gets hurt.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And get sad when Shepherd runs away because of the promise.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And get sad when Shepherd runs away because of the promise.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And get sad when Shepherd runs away because of the promise.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd doesn't want you to be in pain. Shepherd wants you to be happy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd doesn't want you to be in pain. Shepherd wants you to be happy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd doesn't want you to be in pain. Shepherd wants you to be happy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, it's time Shepherd was honest with you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, it's time Shepherd was honest with you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, it's time Shepherd was honest with you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd wants to go with you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd wants to go with you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd wants to go with you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Can Shepherd do that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Can Shepherd do that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Can Shepherd do that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Of course.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Of course.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Of course.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's do that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's do that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's do that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But be careful.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But be careful.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But be careful.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That scrap metal monster might still be lurking around here somewhere.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That scrap metal monster might still be lurking around here somewhere.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That scrap metal monster might still be lurking around here somewhere.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's okay. Shepherd will stop Lurcher if we meet him.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's okay. Shepherd will stop Lurcher if we meet him.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's okay. Shepherd will stop Lurcher if we meet him.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, I won't let the same obvious result happen twice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, I won't let the same obvious result happen twice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, I won't let the same obvious result happen twice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we run into it, run as far away from it as you can, okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we run into it, run as far away from it as you can, okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we run into it, run as far away from it as you can, okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sleep well, the person... Shepherd cherishes the most.

root.m_Talk_FRA: This person... seems to have taught you a lot of things.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd actually knows.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd actually knows.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd actually knows.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That when the heart stops, people don't wake up again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That when the heart stops, people don't wake up again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That when the heart stops, people don't wake up again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: They're not machines. Shepherd knows that he was lying... when he said that he needed to recharge and rest.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They're not machines. Shepherd knows that he was lying... when he said that he needed to recharge and rest.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They're not machines. Shepherd knows that he was lying... when he said that he needed to recharge and rest.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then... why did you continue to stay here?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then... why did you continue to stay here?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then... why did you continue to stay here?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because Shepherd promised.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because Shepherd promised.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because Shepherd promised.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd promised to not leave and stay hidden.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd promised to not leave and stay hidden.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd promised to not leave and stay hidden.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It was the last promise, so Shepherd wanted to keep it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It was the last promise, so Shepherd wanted to keep it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It was the last promise, so Shepherd wanted to keep it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd...

root.m_Talk_ENG: But you suffer when Shepherd gets hurt.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But you suffer when Shepherd gets hurt.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But you suffer when Shepherd gets hurt.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And get sad when Shepherd runs away because of the promise.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And get sad when Shepherd runs away because of the promise.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And get sad when Shepherd runs away because of the promise.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd doesn't want you to be in pain. Shepherd wants you to be happy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd doesn't want you to be in pain. Shepherd wants you to be happy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd doesn't want you to be in pain. Shepherd wants you to be happy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, it's time Shepherd was honest with you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, it's time Shepherd was honest with you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, it's time Shepherd was honest with you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd wants to go with you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd wants to go with you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd wants to go with you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Can Shepherd do that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Can Shepherd do that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Can Shepherd do that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Of course.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Of course.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Of course.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let's do that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let's do that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let's do that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But be careful.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But be careful.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But be careful.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That scrap metal monster might still be lurking around here somewhere.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That scrap metal monster might still be lurking around here somewhere.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That scrap metal monster might still be lurking around here somewhere.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's okay. Shepherd will stop Lurcher if we meet him.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's okay. Shepherd will stop Lurcher if we meet him.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's okay. Shepherd will stop Lurcher if we meet him.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No, I won't let the same obvious result happen twice.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No, I won't let the same obvious result happen twice.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No, I won't let the same obvious result happen twice.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If we run into it, run as far away from it as you can, okay?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If we run into it, run as far away from it as you can, okay?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If we run into it, run as far away from it as you can, okay?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sleep well, the person... Shepherd cherishes the most.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sleep well, the person... Shepherd cherishes the most.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sleep well, the person... Shepherd cherishes the most.
